title: Customer journey map based on user behavior data
use_when: Customer journey map based on user behavior data. Use when the user needs a product workflow for business analysis related to customer journey map based on user behavior data. Trigger terms: pm, business-analysis, customer-journey, analytics, research.

Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
